Community race event

Run From the Cops

A friendly park race where members try to outrun local officers

Zero warrants. Maximum cardio.

The pitch

This is not your average fun run.

You start at the line. The officers start close behind.

Your mission: make it to the finish before they do.

The rules

Simple. Safe. Hilarious.

Run the marked route
No hiding in bushes
No tackling officers
Trash talk encouraged
Beat the cops to brag forever
Who should come?

Anyone who has ever said, “I could probably outrun a cop.”

Now we find out.

The finish

Everyone wins.

Fastest runners earn bragging rights. Everyone else earns a medal, a photo, and a very specific reason to train harder next time.

Coming soon

Are you fast enough?

📍 Park location • 📅 Date • ⏱ Time

Sign up. Show up. Don’t get caught.
